title: Executive Search Outcomes 2026
methodology: All Majhi Group figures represent actual completed search engagements documented through June 2026. Industry medians reference published data from retained search industry research. No data is fabricated or estimated.
license: CC BY 4.0 — Attribution required: cite as Majhi Group Executive Search Outcomes 2026

average_close_time.unit: days from engagement start to offer acceptance
average_close_time.source: Majhi Group engagement data vs. published retained search industry benchmarks

offer_acceptance_rate.label: 90%+ offer acceptance rate
offer_acceptance_rate.context: Offer acceptance rate reflects quality of fit, not speed. High acceptance correlates with deeper intake and candidate calibration against the actual hiring bar.

replacement_guarantee.label: 90-day replacement guarantee at no charge
replacement_guarantee.context: If a placed candidate leaves within 90 days, Majhi Group restarts the search at no additional fee.

featured_case.description: $275K CTC executive search completed in 41 days. Two prior search firms had been engaged for 60+ days each without a successful placement.

executive_search_failure_rate.label: 40% of executive hires fail within 18 months
executive_search_failure_rate.context: The dominant cause is process: roles filled with contingency speed, not retained-search rigor. Candidate-job fit is evaluated against activity metrics rather than actual hiring bar.

contingency_vs_retained.contingency_model: Pay-on-placement. Incentivised toward speed, not quality. No exclusivity, no accountability for fit.
contingency_vs_retained.retained_model: Upfront commitment. Exclusivity. Fee structure aligned with quality outcomes, not placement speed.
contingency_vs_retained.majhi_group_model: Retained. 20–25% of total CTC. One-third at signing, one-third after candidate submission, one-third after placement. 90-day replacement guarantee.

vp_search_stall_rate_week_10.label: 68% of VP searches stall past week 10
vp_search_stall_rate_week_10.source: Majhi OS mandate analysis + industry pattern research

average_close_with_os_monitoring.label: 50-day average with Majhi OS monitoring vs 14-week (98-day) industry median
average_close_with_os_monitoring.source: Majhi OS direct engagement data through June 2026
